text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan suddenly stops as we're walking
back from an outing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Ooo, I smell curry.
choice_data_list: It's just about dinnertime, isn't it?
It's just about dinnertime, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. It reminds me of home. This
smell always came with my mom shouting that it
was time for dinner.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Speaking of, what did your family put in their
curry?
choice_data_list: Is it different for each family?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Speaking of, what did your family put in their
curry?
choice_data_list: Is it different for each family?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Like, my mom used tomato as a secret
ingredient.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She made it her special ingredient because my
dad haaates tomatoes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My mom's curry is the only thing with tomatoes in
it that my dad'll eat.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whenever we had curry for dinner, my mom and
dad always smiled so happily.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! ♪ That's a good way of putting it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. By the way, if you were gonna have curry...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. By the way, if you were gonna have curry...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Would you want something you hated in it? Or
something you liked?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're just like my dad.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the mood for curry now! Let's get some
ingredients on the way home. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text: What can I do for you, miss?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan and I end up going to the produce
shop to buy ingredients for curry.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Will you make me some curry, Big Bro? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Will you make me some curry, Big Sis? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We've only got so much time before
curfew—hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ♪ I said I wanted curry—not that I wanted to
make it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, but I guess I wouldn't mind helping out a bit.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Let's make the taste of happiness together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curry Curren Chan and I make together is
even more delicious than usual.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, I get that! I'd put something I like in it too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I mean, my mom is a good cook. so everything she makes is delicious and looks good to boot... but I get that not everyone can do that. I'm okay with just the things I like!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sooooo...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Follow me, Big Bro. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Follow me, Big Sis. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Two curries, pleeeaaase! ♪

text_block_list.name: Diner Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay! Coming right up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So back to what we were talking about earlier...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So back to what we were talking about earlier...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think I know the real reason my dad liked my
mom's curry so much, even though my mom put
tomatoes in it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It was probably because...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Everything tastes better when you eat it with
someone you love. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wanna try it? I'm sure if you and I eat together...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wanna try it? I'm sure if you and I eat together...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The curry here will taste muuuch better than
usual! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan looks like she loves every bite as she
devours the curry.
